name: @vscode/python-environments
description: An API facade for the Python Environments extension in VS Code

scripts.prepublishOnly: echo "⛔ Can only publish from a secure pipeline ⛔" && node -e "process.exitCode = 1"
scripts.all:publish: git clean -xfd . && npm install && npm run compile
scripts.compile: npm run compile:esm && npm run compile:cjs
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('./out', { recursive: true, force: true });"
